theme_and_archetype.description: Premium SaaS design (Stripe/Linear inspired) with a stark high-contrast base, functional monochrome structures, and precise use of vibrant primary colors based on user role.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-semibold
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium

featured_components.description: Use framer-motion to create a 1px glowing line tracing the border of premium cards (like AI Match Score) in dark mode.

dashboard_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 lg:gap-6

marketing_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12

components.strategy: Shadcn UI base, heavily customized for Linear/Stripe look. Strip default styles.
components.buttons: Flat, sharp or slight radius (rounded-md), distinct hover states (hover:bg-[primary_hover]).
components.inputs: Shadcn input with strict borders, subtle focus rings.
components.tables: Dense, clean lines, no alternating row colors, prominent column headers.
components.charts: Shadcn/Recharts, minimalist tooltips, matching primary colors (Blue/Green).
components.tabs: Override default h-9, make them h-10 or h-12 with distinct active states.
components.badges: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) for statuses, subtle background colors with high-contrast text.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Always explicit. e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white. Active state color must be lighter hue.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Framer motion initial={opacity: 0, y: 10} animate={opacity: 1, y: 0}.

icons.strategy: Minimalist, 1.5px stroke width, scale appropriately with text (e.g., w-4 h-4 for text-sm).

hero_backgrounds.description: Dark abstract textured metallic surface for dark mode hero

portraits_worker.description: Indian construction worker portrait for worker profile mockups

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark/light mode toggle requirement. Use standard Tailwind 'dark:' prefix approach.
Implement separate dashboards for Worker and Employer, routing based on role.
Use Color #0066FF for Worker context and #059669 for Employer context. Contextualize buttons and charts.
Ensure 'Outfit' font is used for headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Verify they are loaded via Google Fonts or similar.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactive pieces (Select, Calendar, Tables, Dialogs) but strip default Vercel-like padding if it feels too cramped. Apply generous spacing (p-6, p-8).
For the AI Match Score Display, use an animated circular progress or a 'Tracing Beam' card style using framer-motion to make it feel premium.
Ensure the WebSocket chat interface is dense and clean (like Linear), not bubbly and cartoonish.
